title: 🌍 Global Brief | 2026-05-31
headline: Ebola outbreak in DRC intensifies as WHO warns of 30-50% death rate; PSG Champions League win sparks Paris unrest; Colombia heads to presidential vote amid political violence.

Top Stories.title: Ebola death rate at 30-50% as WHO chief visits DRC
Top Stories.summary: The World Health Organization warns the Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of the Congo has a 'huge' death rate of 30-50%, as its director arrives in the region. The US is building a quarantine center in Kenya for affected Americans.

Top Stories.title: PSG wins Champions League; 45 arrested in Paris riots
Top Stories.summary: Paris Saint-Germain beat Arsenal on penalties to win back-to-back Champions League titles. Celebrations turned violent in Paris, with 45 arrested and fires set across the city.

Top Stories.title: Colombia presidential election shadowed by violence
Top Stories.summary: Colombians vote Sunday in a polarized presidential runoff between left and right, with a resurgence of political violence and accusations of foreign meddling from Ecuador.

Top Stories.title: Trump floats MAGA rally for 250th after artists pull out
Top Stories.summary: President Trump suggests replacing the planned Freedom 250 concert on the National Mall with a massive MAGA rally after several artists withdrew from the event.

Geopolitics.title: Hegseth urges Asian allies to boost military spending against China
Geopolitics.summary: At the Shangri-La Dialogue, US Defense Secretary Hegseth called for increased defense spending in Asia, citing 'rightful alarm' over China's military buildup, but avoided mentioning Taiwan.

Geopolitics.title: Japan defense minister denies militarism, criticizes China's arsenal
Geopolitics.summary: Shinjiro Koizumi made pointed remarks against China's 'huge arsenal' while rejecting 'neo-militarism' claims, calling for transparent dialogue.

Geopolitics.title: Mexico senate passes bill allowing election annulment for 'foreign interference'
Geopolitics.summary: Opposition critics say the constitutional amendment gives the ruling party power to overturn election results, sparking alarm ahead of future votes.

Geopolitics.title: Lula rejects US 'tinpot country' treatment after gang terrorist designation
Geopolitics.summary: Brazil's president pushed back after the US designated Brazilian gangs as terrorist organizations, following a meeting between Marco Rubio and far-right challenger Flávio Bolsonaro.

Markets & Economy.title: Oil exports through Strait of Hormuz may never return to pre-war levels
Markets & Economy.summary: Iran's blockade during the recent conflict has permanently altered shipping patterns, raising questions about future oil flows and energy security.

Markets & Economy.title: Analysis: End of Iran war may begin new era of US inequality
Markets & Economy.summary: Stocks have boomed while consumers bear high energy costs, suggesting the ceasefire could exacerbate economic disparities.

Markets & Economy.title: NASA ETF turns SpaceX IPO access into hot retail trade
Markets & Economy.summary: Retail investors are piling into space-themed ETFs like NASA, which offers direct exposure to SpaceX ahead of its highly anticipated IPO.

Markets & Economy.title: Micron among most overbought stocks after rally to new highs
Markets & Economy.summary: Micron Technology and Dell Technologies saw strong investor inflows this week, pushing them into overbought territory.

Technology & Science.title: Pope Leo's first encyclical warns against AI illusions
Technology & Science.summary: Pope Leo's encyclical cautions about the dangers of AI creating false realities, emphasizing the value of genuine human relationships.

Technology & Science.title: NTSB struggles with AI reconstruction of cockpit recordings
Technology & Science.summary: The NTSB temporarily pulled its docket system offline after digital images were used to reconstruct cockpit voice recordings from a recent crash, raising privacy concerns.

Technology & Science.title: Meta's AI push faces uphill battle beyond ads
Technology & Science.summary: Meta is trying to expand beyond advertising with AI, but past efforts suggest success is far from guaranteed.

What to Watch Tomorrow.title: Colombia presidential runoff election
What to Watch Tomorrow.summary: Voters head to the polls in a tight race between leftist and right-wing candidates, with political violence and foreign interference allegations looming.

What to Watch Tomorrow.title: Ebola outbreak updates from DRC
What to Watch Tomorrow.summary: WHO chief continues visit; potential for further spread and international response measures.

What to Watch Tomorrow.title: US 250th anniversary concert decision
What to Watch Tomorrow.summary: Trump may announce replacement event after artists pull out; watch for political fallout.

What to Watch Tomorrow.title: SpaceX IPO developments
What to Watch Tomorrow.summary: Retail interest in NASA ETF and potential IPO pricing details could move space stocks.

signal_matrix.signal: Ebola outbreak in DRC with 30-50% fatality rate
Iran war ceasefire may not restore Hormuz oil flows
Japan defense minister criticizes China, calls for military buildup
Colombia presidential election with violence and foreign meddling
US designates Brazilian gangs as terrorists, Lula pushes back
Mexico bill allows election annulment for 'foreign interference'
SpaceX IPO anticipation drives retail into NASA ETF
Micron overbought after rally to new highs
